title: Fix button background colors — light fill, native border (v0.4.149)

requirements.text: In FileList.tsx, update the 'Upload Files' button so it has a light blue filled background (e.g. bg-blue-100 in light mode / bg-blue-900/30 in dark mode), uses the native/default button border (no custom border color or outline color — remove any blue border/ring/outline classes), and has dark text and icon for contrast.

quotes: yes the background (lightly) filled - still looking like a native button - this was already clarified many times (no border color at all - native button border)
Upload Files: Light blue filled background, native button border (no blue outline), dark text/icon

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Upload Files' button has a light blue filled background (subtle tint, not vivid)
No custom blue border, outline, or ring is applied — the border looks like a standard native button border
Text and icon on the button are dark-colored for contrast against the light blue background
The button does not have any colored border in dark mode either

requirements.text: In FileList.tsx, update the 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' buttons so they have a light yellow filled background (e.g. bg-yellow-100 in light mode / bg-yellow-900/30 in dark mode), use the native/default button border (no custom border color or outline color — remove any yellow border/ring/outline classes), and have dark text and icon for contrast.

quotes: New Folder & Upload Folder: Light yellow filled background, native button border (no yellow outline), dark text/icon

acceptanceCriteria: The 'New Folder' and 'Upload Folder' buttons have a light yellow filled background (subtle tint, not vivid)
No custom yellow border, outline, or ring is applied — the border looks like a standard native button border
Text and icon on the buttons are dark-colored for contrast against the light yellow background
The buttons do not have any colored border in dark mode either

requirements.text: Update the APP_VERSION constant in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from '0.4.148' to '0.4.149'.

constraints: Do not apply any custom border color, ring color, or outline color to the affected buttons — only the background fill should change
Button styling must use Tailwind CSS classes consistent with the existing codebase conventions
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Changing any other button styles in the application
Any layout or structural changes to FileList.tsx
